name: PT Anugerah Kagum Karya Utama Tbk
summary: PT Anugerah Kagum Karya Utama Tbk, through its subsidiaries, engages in general trading business in Indonesia. The company offers business, management, and administration consulting; mining operations support; general mining management; and hotel management. It is also involved in the rental of heavy equipment. The company was formerly known as PT Alam Karya Unggul Tbk and changed its name to PT Anugerah Kagum Karya Utama Tbk in October 2016. The company was incorporated in 2001 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Anugerah Kagum Karya Utama Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Eka Mandiri Anugerah Sejahtera.
